subject: Daein
fact: Daein holds a singular ambition to acquire what he calls "FU money."
source_quote: Daein was skeptical, loudly declaring his singular ambition to acquire what he called "FU money"

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim argues that destiny itself might be calling the party to the mission.
source_quote: Bramgrim, his hair pointing in every conceivable direction from his recent communion with nature, argued that destiny itself might be calling

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas ruefully noted that they had missed a golden opportunity by never reading the ledger from their previous heist.
source_quote: Akritas also ruefully noted, mid-swirl, that they had missed a golden opportunity by never reading the ledger from their previous heist

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas realized they could have looked in the ledger.
source_quote: She stops swirling the drink and goes, fuck. You're right. Or at the very least, we could have looked in the ledger

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim immediately suspected Glor's claims of peaceful cohabitation.
source_quote: Glor claimed, to Bramgrim's immediate suspicion, that his community had chosen peaceful cohabitation with other Underdark species over the enslavement and conquest typical of his kind

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas was not moved to embrace Glor despite his claims.
source_quote: Akritas, still nursing her drink, was not exactly moved to embrace him

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noted that the fire giants' plans would be very bad for business.
source_quote: a development that, as Akritas pointedly noted, would be very bad for business

subject: Daein
fact: Daein delivered a cold and credible warning that the Ryxyg colony would face consequences if the intelligence proved false.
source_quote: When Daein delivered a cold and credible warning — that if the promised intelligence proved false, the Ryxyg colony would face consequences

subject: Glor
fact: Glor paused and reassessed the group before him.
source_quote: Glor paused, reassessed the group before him

subject: Glor
fact: Glor took the party seriously for the first time.
source_quote: and for the first time took them seriously

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur recognized the destruction on the Mulmaster maps as the work of elemental cults based on his own history.
source_quote: Felkur, drawing on his own history with Mulmaster, recognized the destruction as the work of elemental cults

subject: Daein
fact: Daein recognized the defiant voice in Undercommon as Arrizz, a drow they had encountered in their past.
source_quote: a voice Daein recognized as Arrizz, a drow they had encountered in their past

subject: Glor
fact: Glor claimed his community had chosen peaceful cohabitation over enslavement and conquest.
source_quote: Glor claimed, to Bramgrim's immediate suspicion, that his community had chosen peaceful cohabitation with other Underdark species over the enslavement and conquest typical of his kind

subject: Glor
fact: Glor noted that a mind flayer without the restraint of the collective is a predator without a leash.
source_quote: Glor was unmoved, noting that a mind flayer without the restraint of the collective was a predator without a leash

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suggested that if the mind flayers are lying, the party is powerful enough to return and cause significant harm to their colony.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests that if the mind flayers are lying, the party is powerful enough to return and cause significant harm to their colony

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim lectures the party on the unfathomable consequences of thievery.
source_quote: Bramgrim lectures the party on the unfathomable consequences of thievery

subject: Daein
fact: Daein enthusiastically clarified his life goal as acquiring FU money.
source_quote: "I want FU money." — Daein enthusiastically clarifying his life goal after the GM introduced the concept of 'f*** you money' as a campaign ambition milestone

subject: Glor
fact: Glor deadpanned that if he had to choose which brain to eat last, it would be Daein's.
source_quote: "Daein, do not worry. If I have to choose which brain I will eat last, it will be yours." — Glor

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's communion with nature took an unexpected and very visible turn, leaving the party deeply unsettled.
source_quote: Bramgrim's communion with nature took an unexpected and very visible turn

subject: The Party
fact: The party felt deeply and permanently unsettled by Bramgrim's naked sprint.
source_quote: leaving the rest of the party deeply and permanently unsettled

subject: The Party
fact: The party felt a constant mental buzz from the Faerzress as they approached the rogue's lair.
source_quote: the Faerzress growing so thick in the final stretch that a constant mental buzz settled over each of them

subject: The Party
fact: The party was given pause by the chill radiating from the second door.
source_quote: The second door was noticeably colder than anything else in the lair, radiating a chill that gave the party pause
